name: Pinellas County Schools
districtFact: Pinellas County Schools serves families across St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Largo, and the Gulf Coast communities of Pinellas County, where school calendar planning often intersects with hurricane season, beach tourism, and Tampa Bay commuting.

about.title: About Pinellas County Schools
about.content: Pinellas County Schools serves families across Pinellas County, Florida, including St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Largo, Palm Harbor, Seminole, Tarpon Springs, Dunedin, and Gulf Coast beach communities. For calendar planning, the districtwide instructional calendar is most useful for first and last day dates, quarter and semester dates, school holidays, teacher workdays, non-student days, spring holidays, winter holidays, and potential hurricane make-up days.

about.title: How to Use This Pinellas Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the Pinellas County Schools board-approved instructional calendar PDF in a searchable format and provides a one-time calendar import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. Families should still confirm school-specific open houses, testing, athletics, graduation dates, and emergency schedule changes through PCS and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Pinellas Families
content: Track potential hurricane make-up days separately because PCS marks several non-student or holiday dates that may be converted if make-up time is needed.
Use the two-hour early release on the last student day when planning pickup, after-school care, and transportation.
Separate teacher workdays and non-student days from major breaks because they create additional student no-school weekdays.
Check the official PCSB calendar page for revisions before booking travel around spring holidays, winter holidays, and late-May dates.

customSections.label: When Does Pinellas County Schools Start in 2026?
customSections.content: Pinellas County Schools starts on Tuesday, August 11, 2026 for the 2026-2027 school year.

groups.label: Other quick answers
items: When is Pinellas County Spring Break in 2027? Spring Holidays run March 13 through March 21, 2027.
When is the last day of school in Pinellas County? The last student day is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with a two-hour early release.

customSections.label: Pinellas County Schools District Facts for Calendar Planning
customSections.content: Pinellas County Schools is the public school district for Pinellas County on Florida's Gulf Coast, with district operations centered in Largo and schools serving communities across the Tampa-St. Petersburg-Clearwater metro area. Calendar planning is especially local because families may coordinate school breaks with beach tourism, Tampa Bay commuting, hurricane-season notices, and school-level events in St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Largo, Palm Harbor, Seminole, Tarpon Springs, and Dunedin.

groups.label: Entity details
items: Calendar source type: board-approved instructional calendar PDF plus district calendar page.
Planning factors: potential hurricane make-up days, two-hour early release on the last student day, teacher workdays, and school-specific campus events.

customSections.label: Pinellas School Calendar Types and Program Notes
customSections.content: Most families use the districtwide Pinellas County Schools instructional calendar, but some programs may publish additional dates for testing, athletics, graduation, magnet events, career programs, or school-specific activities. The district calendar is the right source for systemwide student attendance dates, while campus notices are still needed for events that vary by school.

groups.label: Which calendar to check
items: District instructional calendar: use this for first day, last day, holidays, spring holidays, winter holidays, teacher workdays, non-student days, and potential hurricane make-up days.
School-level calendars: check your assigned campus for open house dates, testing schedules, athletics, graduation, club events, and pickup or bell-schedule changes.
Specialized programs: magnet, career, virtual, or other program calendars may add deadlines or event dates that are not listed on the districtwide instructional calendar.

compareIntro: Compare the Pinellas County school calendar with other Florida district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Pinellas calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Pinellas County Schools board-approved instructional calendar, including first day, last day, school holidays, non-student days, teacher workdays, breaks, quarter dates, semester dates, and potential hurricane make-up days.

districtFaqs.q: Does Pinellas County list hurricane make-up days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The official PCS instructional calendar marks potential hurricane make-up days. Families should watch district announcements if severe weather affects the school year.

districtFaqs.q: Is the last day of school an early release day in Pinellas County?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The official instructional calendar notes that students are released two hours early on the last student day.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute Pinellas calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Pinellas County Schools calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with PCS.
